description_wiki: Somalia, officially the Federal Republic of Somalia, is the easternmost country in continental Africa.

description: capital and the largest city of Somalia
description_wiki: Mogadishu, locally known as Xamar or Hamar, is the capital and most populous city of Somalia.

description: civil war taking place in Somalia since 1991
description_wiki: The Somali Civil War (Somali: Dagaalkii Sokeeye ee Soomaaliya; Arabic: الحرب الأهلية الصومالية al-ḥarb al-’ahliyya aṣ-ṣūmāliyya) is an ongoing civil war that is taking place in Somalia.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.
